creator: ports@geeksrus.net
text:
Fix: Note: this fix installs two extra files in "files". xx-patch-configure.ac
is the *correct* patch, but we can't use it. xx-README explains why we
can't use the correct patch.

Matt: I'll submit this to the ac-archive dudes at sourceforge. 
How-To-Repeat: 
Do a make and watch the configure step carefully.
